title: Josephia fraseri
intro: Josephia fraseri, also known as Fraser's Josephia, is a flowering plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, Josephia fraseri has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Josephia fraseri is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
